channel.title: +१ on साम-वेदे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +१ on साम-वेदे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.description: 01 अथातो गृह्या कर्माणि ...{Loading}... अथातो गृह्या कर्माणि १ Oldenberg ...{Loading}... 1 1. Now henceforth the domestic sacrifices (will be explained). 02 उदगयनपूर्वपक्षपुण्याहेषु प्रागावर्तनादह्नः कालोऽनादेशे ...{Loading}... उदगयनपूर्वपक्षपुण्याहेषु प्रागावर्तनादह्नः कालोऽनादेशे २ Oldenberg ...{Loading}... 2 2. During the northern course of the sun, at the time of the increasing moon, on auspicious days, before noon: this is the time at which the constellations are lucky, unless a special statement is given.

01 पूर्वे भागे वेश्मनो ...{Loading}... पूर्वे भागे वेश्मनो गोमयेनोपलिप्य तस्य मध्यदेशे लक्षणं कुर्यात् १ Oldenberg ...{Loading}... 1 1. In the eastern part of his dwelling he should besmear (the place on which the sacrifice will be performed) with cowdung, and should draw in the middle of it the lines. 02 दक्षिणतः प्राचीं लेखामुल्लिख्य ...{Loading}... दक्षिणतः प्राचीं लेखामुल्लिख्य २ Oldenberg ...{Loading}... To the south he should draw a line from west to east.

01 ब्रह्मचारी वेदमधीत्योपन्याहृत्य गुरवेऽनुज्ञातो ...{Loading}... ब्रह्मचारी वेदमधीत्योपन्याहृत्य गुरवेऽनुज्ञातो दारान् कुर्वीत १ Oldenberg ...{Loading}... 1 1. A student after he has studied the Veda and has offered a present to his teacher, should, with permission (of his parents), take a wife. 02 आप्लवनं च ...{Loading}... आप्लवनं च २ Oldenberg ...{Loading}... 2 2. And (he should take) the bath (which signifies the end of studentship). 03 तयोराप्लवनं पूर्वम् .

01 प्रागुदीचीमुद्वहेत् ...{Loading}... प्रागुदीचीमुद्वहेत् १ Oldenberg ...{Loading}... 1 1. He should carry her away in a north-eastern direction. 02 ब्राह्मणकुलेऽग्निमुपसमाधाय पश्चादग्नेर्लोहितं चर्मानडुहमुत्तरलोम ...{Loading}... ब्राह्मणकुलेऽग्निमुपसमाधाय पश्चादग्नेर्लोहितं चर्मानडुहमुत्तरलोम प्राग्ग्रीवमास्तीर्य वाग्यतामुपवेशयेत् २ Oldenberg ...{Loading}... In a Brāhmaṇa’s house he should establish the (nuptial) fire, should spread out to the west of the fire a red bull’s hide with the hair outside and with the neck to the east, and should make her, who has to keep silence, sit down (thereon).

01 यस्मिन्नग्नौ पाणिं गृह्णीयात्स ...{Loading}... यस्मिन्नग्नौ पाणिं गृह्णीयात्स गृह्यः १ Oldenberg ...{Loading}... 1 1. The fire used at his wedding (is kept as) his (sacred) domestic fire. 03 यस्मिन्वाऽन्त्यां समिधमादध्यात् ...{Loading}... यस्मिन्वाऽन्त्यां समिधमादध्यात् २ Oldenberg ...{Loading}... Or that on which he (as a student) puts the last piece of wood. 03 निर्मन्थ्यो ...{Loading}... निर्मन्थ्यो वा पुण्यस्सोऽनर्धुकः ३ Oldenberg ...{Loading}... Or (a fire) kindled by attrition: that is pure, but it does not bring prosperity.
